name: DriveTime Used Cars
description_short: DriveTime sells used cars with in-house financing, letting shoppers calculate personalized down payments and monthly terms online before visiting a dealership.
description_long:
DriveTime is a used car dealership chain with locations including Fresno, California. The company's website centers on a payment-first shopping experience: buyers enter a down payment amount and receive personalized monthly payment estimates on every vehicle in inventory before ever visiting a lot. This model positions DriveTime as both a car retailer and a direct auto financing provider, with the financing terms tailored to each buyer's stated budget rather than anchored to a standard sticker price.

DriveTime maintains a substantial used vehicle inventory spanning 15-plus makes — including Chevrolet (44 units), Ford (43), Hyundai (45), Kia (39), Nissan (55), and Jeep (29) at the Fresno location — with prices ranging from $7,000 to $35,000 and model years from 2006 to 2027. Shoppers can filter by make, model, price range, year, body type, mileage (up to 150,000), MPG, drivetrain, engine, fuel type, and over 30 individual features including Bluetooth, heated seats, navigation, blind spot sensors, and rear view cameras. The site also includes an online trade-in estimation tool and a dealership visit scheduling feature, allowing buyers to reserve a specific vehicle.

A distinguishing aspect of DriveTime's platform is the depth of pre-visit transparency on payment structure. Every inventory listing shows the vehicle price alongside a personalized down payment field and a projected monthly payment — though those payment figures are locked behind a data-entry step. The company advertises that 10% of customers qualify for $0 down, and vehicle history filters (1-owner, no-accident) are available to help buyers assess risk before scheduling. Inventory can be searched from nearest dealership to nationwide, confirming multi-location operations.

DriveTime is a practical option for buyers who want financing arranged through the dealership rather than a bank or credit union, and who prefer to shop by monthly budget. The key limitation is opacity: interest rates, APR, and total loan cost are not disclosed during browsing — buyers must submit personal information to unlock actual financing terms, making pre-shopping cost comparisons difficult. Additionally, the fine print discloses that advertised prices exclude taxes, finance charges, and documentation fees up to $599, which can add meaningful cost to the transaction. The inventory skews toward higher-mileage vehicles (many in the 75,000–120,000-mile range), which is typical for this price segment.
pros: Personalized monthly payment estimates displayed on every inventory listing before visiting the dealership
Large inventory with 400+ vehicles across 15+ makes at the Fresno location alone
Vehicle prices range $7,000–$35,000 with model years spanning 2006–2027
Online trade-in value calculator lets buyers estimate trade-in before the dealership visit
30+ feature filters including safety tech (blind spot, lane warning, park assist) and convenience (heated seats, remote start)
Vehicle history filters for 1-owner and no-accident designations
10% of customers qualify for $0 down per the site's own disclosure
Online dealership visit scheduling to reserve a specific vehicle
cons: Financing rates and APR are hidden ('locked') during browsing — buyers must submit personal information to see actual loan terms
Documentation fees up to $599 are excluded from all advertised vehicle prices per site fine print
Many inventory listings show 75,000–120,000+ miles, which is a durability consideration at these price points
Financing is tied exclusively to vehicle purchase at DriveTime — not a standalone loan product
No visible total loan cost or interest rate transparency until after personal data is entered
best_for: Used car buyers who want to shop by monthly payment and down payment rather than sticker price
Buyers seeking in-house dealership financing without going through a separate bank or credit union
Shoppers looking for used vehicles in the $10,000–$20,000 range with a wide make/model selection
Consumers who want to estimate trade-in value and lock in payment terms before visiting a lot
diagnosis: DriveTime is best suited for used car buyers who want in-house financing and a payment-first browsing experience, particularly those who prefer to know their monthly terms before stepping into a dealership. The main caveat is that actual interest rates and total loan cost are withheld until buyers enter personal data, so cost-conscious shoppers should be prepared to compare DriveTime's unlocked terms against credit union or bank auto loan offers before committing.
services: Used vehicle sales across 15+ makes including Chevrolet, Ford, Hyundai, Kia, Nissan, and Jeep
In-house auto financing with personalized monthly payment terms
Online down payment calculator tied to live inventory
Nationwide inventory search with distance-based dealership filtering (25–250 miles or nationwide)
Advanced inventory filtering by MPG, mileage limit, fuel type, and drivetrain
Vehicle history filtering for 1-owner and no-accident vehicles
Feature-level filtering across 30+ options including safety, entertainment, and convenience
Body type filtering: sedan, coupe, truck, SUV, van, convertible
